prompts.name: Peace Sign
prompts.text: Have the subject make a cheerful peace sign with natural finger placement and relaxed hand anatomy.

prompts.name: Waving
prompts.text: Have the subject wave warmly toward the viewer with an open hand and friendly body language.

prompts.name: Heart Hands
prompts.text: Have the subject form a heart shape with both hands, keeping the fingers clean, readable, and naturally posed.

prompts.name: Hands Behind Back
prompts.text: Place the subject's hands gently behind their back for a sweet, polite, or slightly shy pose.

prompts.name: Hands in Pockets
prompts.text: Place the subject's hands casually in their pockets with relaxed shoulders and natural posture.

prompts.name: Crossed Arms
prompts.text: Pose the subject with arms crossed confidently while preserving believable anatomy and hand placement.

prompts.name: Touching Hair
prompts.text: Have one hand gently touch or brush the hair, creating a soft, natural, and expressive gesture.

prompts.name: Holding Book
prompts.text: Have the subject hold an open book naturally, with believable grip, readable hand placement, and relaxed arms.

prompts.name: Holding Cup
prompts.text: Have the subject hold a warm cup or mug with both hands, creating a cozy and grounded moment.

prompts.name: Clasped Hands
prompts.text: Place the subject's hands clasped together gently in front of the body, suggesting calmness or anticipation.

prompts.name: Pointing
prompts.text: Have the subject point toward something with a clear, readable gesture and natural wrist angle.

prompts.name: Covering Mouth
prompts.text: Have the subject lightly cover their mouth with one hand to suggest surprise, shyness, or laughter.

prompts.name: Hands on Hips
prompts.text: Pose the subject with hands on hips, creating a confident and assertive silhouette.

prompts.name: Holding Flower
prompts.text: Have the subject hold a flower delicately, with soft fingers and careful attention to hand anatomy.

prompts.name: Prayer Hands
prompts.text: Place the subject's hands together in a gentle prayer-like gesture, creating a calm or reverent mood.
